name: @opdstar/nhi-mcp
description: Taiwan National Health Insurance (NHI) reference data for AI agents via Model Context Protocol — rejection codes, procedure mappings, audit indicators and clauses, drug catalog and rules, fee schedule, major-illness coverage, appeal-resolution signals, and semantic wiki search. Powered by OPDSTAR (https://opdstar.com).

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build

author: OPDSTAR Team <support@opdstar.com> (https://opdstar.com)
